exportHint: Download a full JSON copy of your journal - profile, tasks, lists, weeks, trackers, habits, tags, routines and stats. Attachments are included as links and details, not files.
importHint: Restore from a previous export. Importing merges by id, so re-importing the same file changes nothing.
confirmBody: This will merge the following into your journal:

error.invalidFile: This file isn't a valid SnugWeek export.
error.wrongVersion: This export was made by a different version and can't be imported.
error.writeFailed: Something went wrong while importing. Re-importing the same file will fix any half-finished writes.
